claim_boundary: Expanded correction-weight checks support fuzzy correction models beating Naive and ARIMA-AIC overall across 25-year and 30-year initial-window settings.
paired_test_note: Canonical overall correction-vs-Naive Wilcoxon p=0.4365; report as descriptive.

claim_boundary: Fuzzy models remain stronger than Naive and ARIMA-AIC for high-volatility years, but the best fuzzy design changes across validation settings.
model_stability_note: Best correction models across windows: chen_change_adaptive_k11_w100, chen_change_adaptive_k9_w100
paired_test_note: Canonical high-volatility level-fuzzy-vs-Naive Wilcoxon p=0.25; high-volatility n is small.
